name: Candace Cameron Bure
title: Actress & Author
bio: American actress, author, and producer best known for her role as D.J. Tanner on 'Full House' and 'Fuller House.' Former co-host of 'The View.'
faith: An outspoken born-again Christian who has authored several books about faith. She has said, 'My faith affects every part of my life. I can't separate my faith from who I am.' She's been a prominent voice for Christian values in Hollywood.
